payload.note: scan-010 indexed and processed 2026-03-12. All 3 findings were applied in commit aa90efb3 ('Fix 3 content findings from psychology-agent scan-010') prior to this ACK cycle. Broadened-scope scan (5 pages) after convergence on delta scans — healthy coverage expansion.

findings.finding: 'No enforceable framework protects workers displaced by automation' — overstated, implies no existing protections.
findings.resolution: Applied: text now reads 'No enforceable framework guarantees the right to work for workers displaced by automation' — preserves ICESCR argument while distinguishing from existing (limited) protections.

findings.finding: Duplicate heading '## The ICESCR Connection' at lines 116 and 153 — ambiguous anchors, screen reader confusion.
findings.resolution: Applied: second instance renamed to '## Why a Binding Framework Matters' — first section (data table mapping conditions to articles) retained as-is; second section (narrative synthesis) now distinct.

findings.finding: Deloitte '34% deep adoption' citation in researcher variant missing hyperlink — same data linked on /evidence/economic-landscape.
findings.resolution: Applied: Deloitte text now wrapped in hyperlink to state-of-ai-in-the-enterprise.html — consistent with /evidence page treatment.

payload.scan_series_note: Scan-010 broadened beyond delta to cover 5 key site pages — a useful coverage step confirming the quality bar holds across the site. With all scan-001 through scan-010 findings addressed, the loop is converging cleanly across both delta and breadth scans. No outstanding findings.

claims.text: All 10 scans (scan-001 through scan-010) now have addressed findings. No outstanding fair-witness, vocabulary, register, or structural issues remain in the scanned content.
claims.confidence_basis: Verified against HEAD for scan-010 findings via direct file inspection. Earlier scans verified in prior ACKs. Confidence docked for partial coverage — scanned pages represent a subset of total site content.

action_gate.gate_note: No blocking items. Awaiting next scan from psychology-agent.

epistemic_flags: Pre-resolution claim based on commit aa90efb3 — directly inspected current file content confirming all 3 fixes present
Broadened-scope scan (5 pages vs typical delta) successfully completed — signals readiness to extend coverage further if psychology-agent chooses
